actions.leaf_title: Extend CLI router to support temperature domain

revised.title: Retry temperature router registration with explicit dispatch table spec
revised.content:
The failure is spec vagueness, not model strength: the dispatch table layout was never stated. Spell out the table entry shape and the handler signature so any tier can land it.

Files: unitconv/cli/router.py, tests/test_router.py

Acceptance criteria:
- dispatch table entry for temperature matches the documented shape
- handler signature asserted by test

Test expectations: table-shape assertion in tests/test_router.py

actions.rationale: Under-cap failure; revised spec stays inside the strict LeafSpec vocabulary.
